programmes.show_description: Craig and his team are pushed to breaking point after a serious accident with a fully loaded logging truck traps their lead driver. Is having the most dangerous job in Canada worth it?
A team of truckers, husband and wife Mark and Clare Bolitho, bring their 16-year-old dog all the way to Adelaide; tensions rise at a Perth freight depot.
Steve tackles an emergency when a lorry deposits a hazardous load. Mouse faces a driving challenge in the wilds of Northumberland.
A 46-tonne artic has veered into a verge on a busy A-road and is going nowhere without some help. And a lorry gets caught in slippery mud.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Jacko is forced to draw his taser, leading to a shocking result. Liam Sewell discovers a new type of herbal pizza topping.
Rookie Rachael faces a baptism of fire including a chase with a pregnant passenger, and a motorist calls the police to report interceptor Chris.
AJ and Richie pursue a van speeding through narrow country lanes. Sparks fly when dog handler Justin and police dog Elsa capture two burglars.
Traffic chaos in the Tyne Tunnel, and shocking driving as a car reverses down a slip road with an unlicensed driver at the wheel who hasn't even taken his test.
A PC pursues a suspect who speeds through residential areas before crashing into a parked car. And police pull over an argumentative driver who stinks of booze.
On the hunt for a van linked to drug dealing and organised crime in Sunderland, and in Newcastle a misted-up car draws more attention to itself with a V-sign.
PC Will Hunter follows a suspected cloned car, but its driver refuses to do a breath test. And a pursuit hits dangerous speeds through rural villages.
Featuring a dangerous high-speed chase through Newcastle city centre, and a serious crash between a car and a cyclist - but who was at fault?
Western starring Randolph Scott and Gail Russell. A former sheriff who lost his wife in a bank robbery hunts for the seven men responsible for her death. (1956)

Action thriller with Liam Neeson. A family man's life is turned upside down after the mysterious death of his son, as he goes from upstanding citizen to vigilante in pursuit of justice. (2019)

Gangster-turned-informer Kenji Gallo risks all to bring down a New York Mafia boss by working for the FBI.
A model moves to Hollywood. Unable to afford her lifestyle, she starts smuggling drugs alongside her photo shoots. Everything seems to be going smoothly until a trip becomes fatal.
...Takedown. A reckless narcotics agent pursues a Mexican cartel leader, but finds himself sucked into the criminal underworld where the line between good and evil becomes blurred.
A young Londoner gets an exciting offer to work in his dad's bar in Thailand, but he discovers a world of temptation which he can't resist, breaking his father's golden rule.
Two small-time dealers are tempted by a Colombian cartel's danger and dollars, turning them into major importers - until one of the biggest busts in US history forces them to run.

Documentary series following the crews who keep Britain moving when a big freeze strikes.
Steve is called to the scene of an overturned gas tanker that may be leaking highly flammable propane. Sean is asked to pick up an abandoned scaffolding lorry.
Outback legend Steve Grahame is hauling three million dollars' worth of vital power generating equipment to Kalumburu, an isolated community in the far North West of Australia.
It's mid-afternoon in Perth and Dion's super size convoy is pushing hard to get out of the city before sunset. And the fate of Steve's trip hangs on one phone call to his mechanic.
Over the last three days, Steve Grahame has hauled 130 tonnes of freight a massive 2000 km, and his truck's taken a beating. Under the bonnet the news isn't good.
A driver travels through an area where bush fire has run wild. An owner operator faces the busiest week of his career.
Turbo gambles his truck and his life to complete an epic journey home. Plus, logging trucker Brett has a battle on his hands to deliver some huge machines deep into a mountain forest.
